info.title: Fleet Management API
info.description:
Production-grade REST API for fleet management.

## Authentication
All endpoints except health, login, refresh, and logout require a valid JWT access token.
Refresh and logout accept a refresh token in the request body instead of a bearer access token.
Include the token in the `Authorization` header: `Bearer <token>`.

## Permission Model
Every protected endpoint enforces a specific permission key. Users without the required permission receive a `403` response.

## Pagination
List endpoints return:
```json
{
  "items": [],
  "pagination": { "page": 1, "limit": 20, "total": 0, "totalPages": 0 }
}
```
Query parameters: `?page=1&limit=20&search=&status=`

fuelEntryId.description: Optional fuel entry ID to link this document to a fuel entry

get.description: Returns API and database health status. No authentication required.

post.description: Authenticate with username or email and password. Returns JWT access token and refresh token.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user with their permissions.

post.description: Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token.

401.description: Refresh token is invalid or expired

get.description: Paginated list with search and status filter.

200.description: Array of categories with asset counts

400.description: Asset already assigned or invalid holder

get.description: Filter by category, type, status, entity, and more.

file.description: PDF, JPEG, PNG, or WebP file (max 10MB)

fuelEntryId.description: Optional fuel entry ID to link this document to a fuel entry

400.description: Validation error or invalid file type

entryMode.description: QUICK_AMOUNT: only totalAmount required. FULL_DETAILS: quantityLiters and pricePerLiter required, totalAmount auto-calculated. RECEIPT_ASSISTED: OCR-extracted values.

quantityLiters.description: Required when entryMode is FULL_DETAILS. Omitted or null for QUICK_AMOUNT.

pricePerLiter.description: Required when entryMode is FULL_DETAILS. Omitted or null for QUICK_AMOUNT.

totalAmount.description: Required when entryMode is QUICK_AMOUNT. Auto-calculated when entryMode is FULL_DETAILS.

paymentMode.description: Payment method used for the fuel purchase.

post.description: OCR extraction of fuel receipt data from a stored document. Accepts the storage key and MIME type of the receipt image/PDF.

storageKey.description: Storage key of the uploaded receipt document

mimeType.description: MIME type of the receipt file (e.g. application/pdf, image/jpeg)

400.description: Invalid storage key or extraction failed

200.description: Dashboard summary with income, expenses, pending/overdue payments

get.summary: Get effective permissions for current user

200.description: Effective permissions breakdown (role, allowed, denied, effective)
Full access summary including user, role, permissions, scopes, activity

get.summary: Get access summary for all users

200.description: Array of user access summaries with counts

get.summary: Get effective permissions for a user
List permission overrides for a user
List data scopes for a user

200.description: Activity logs for the specified user

get.summary: Get effective permissions for a user (alias)
List permission overrides for a user (alias)
List data scopes for a user (alias)

200.description: Activity logs for the specified user

post.summary: Create a profile link (admin, requires profile_link_create + scope validation)

403.description: Insufficient scope or permission. For DRIVER links: requires DRIVER UPDATE/MANAGE scope on target driver, super_admin, or GLOBAL/MANAGE scope. Non-DRIVER types restricted to super_admin.

get.summary: Get profile links for a user

200.description: List of profile links for user

get.summary: Get profile links for a user (admin, requires profile_link_view)

200.description: List of profile links for user

post.summary: Create profile link for user (admin, requires profile_link_create + DRIVER scope)

get.summary: Get linked driver profile (requires active DRIVER UserProfileLink)

200.description: Driver profile for active linked driver

404.description: No linked driver profile or link revoked

get.summary: Get trips for linked driver (requires active DRIVER UserProfileLink)
Get vehicles for linked driver (requires active DRIVER UserProfileLink)
Get documents for linked driver (requires active DRIVER UserProfileLink)
Get fuel entries for linked driver (requires active DRIVER UserProfileLink)

200.description: Paginated fuel entries for linked driver

get.summary: Get expenses for linked driver (requires active DRIVER UserProfileLink)

403.description: Insufficient permission or out of scope

patch.summary: Request changes on fuel submission (requires driver_submission_review)
